security_policies.name: block-dev-to-prod-db
security_policies.description: Block direct access from Dev VPC to Production database subnet

security_policies.name: block-staging-to-prod-db
security_policies.description: Block direct access from Staging VPC to Production database subnet

security_policies.name: allow-prod-app-to-prod-db
security_policies.description: Allow Production app subnet to access Production database

security_policies.name: block-internet-to-db
security_policies.description: Block internet access to any database subnet

security_policies.name: allow-prod-staging-peering
security_policies.description: Allow HTTP/HTTPS traffic between Production and Staging
